26.reason: [Sorting the array at the beginning of each recursive call destroys the current permutation state and prevents generating all permutations correctly. Permutation generation should not involve sorting the subarray at each step.]

Permutation generation requires swapping elements without reordering the rest via sorting. This prevents correct generation of all permutations and breaks lexicographical order logic.]
